## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Problem Statement

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## User Benefit

**Who would benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] All users
- [ ] Authenticated users only
- [ ] Business owners
- [ ] Mobile users
- [ ] Desktop users
- [ ] Users with accessibility needs

## Use Cases

Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be valuable:

1. **Scenario 1**: [Describe the situation and how the feature helps]
2. **Scenario 2**: [Describe another use case]
3. **Scenario 3**: [Additional scenarios if applicable]

## Feature Details

### Core Functionality

Describe the main functionality of this feature:

### User Interface Considerations

- [ ] New page/view required
- [ ] Modification to existing UI
- [ ] Mobile-first design needed
- [ ] Accessibility considerations
- [ ] Integration with existing navigation

### Data Requirements

- [ ] New database models/fields
- [ ] External API integration (specify which)
- [ ] User data collection/storage
- [ ] Location data requirements

## Technical Considerations

### Integration Points

- [ ] Yelp Fusion API
- [ ] Google OAuth/Maps
- [ ] Geolocation services
- [ ] Existing search functionality
- [ ] User favorites system
- [ ] Review system

### Implementation Complexity

- [ ] Simple (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Complex (> 3 days)
- [ ] Epic (requires multiple stories)

### Dependencies

List any features or systems this depends on:

## Alternatives Considered

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

### Related Features (from ideas.md)

- [ ] QR code menu integration
- [ ] Voting on choices with permalinks
- [ ] Decision wheel enhancement
- [ ] Social sharing features
- [ ] Business plan integration

### Business Value

How does this feature align with the app's goals of helping users find places near them?

### References

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority Level

- [ ] Critical - Core functionality
- [ ] High - Enhances main user journey
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Future consideration

## Success Metrics

How would we measure the success of this feature?
